Off Calendar Feb-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.
APPEARANCES: JULIAN LAGOS, PRO PER (415.584.1700) AND HEALAN TING, PRO PER (NO PHONE NUMBER LISTED) APPEARING FOR PETITIONER. CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3875) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. STEVEN L. VETTEL, ESQUIRE (FARELLA BRAUN + MARTEL, 415.954.4400) APPEARING FOR REAL-PARTY-IN-INTEREST.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE STANDARD OF REVIEW IS SET FORTH IN C.C.P. SECTION 1094.5. THE DEFENDANTS DID NOT ACT IN EXCESS OF THEIR JURISDICATION; THERE WAS A FAIR HEARING, AND THERE WAS NO ABUSE OF DISCRETION. COMMISSIONER GARCIA HAD NO OBLIGATION TO RECUSE HIMSELF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
